text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years in the Twinkle Series with
Kitasan Black have come to a close, and in that
time, she's gone from an unknown racer to a
household name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always been one to extend a hand to those
in need, but now those hands reach much further
than before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All the way to the northern wilderness.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's go, everyone! Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The kids chase and chase after Kitasan Black as
she runs along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both the fast and slow kids are overjoyed by the
game. After most of the kids are completely
exhausted...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Can you still run? You look pretty tired... You
sure you're okay?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Yeah! I'm fine! Running is so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You know what? I want to run in races like you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, is that so? Well, I'm sure you'll make your
dream come true someday!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Oh, but... I dunno if I can do it.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
There aren't any running classes 'round where I
live, and there're loads of kids who are much
faster than me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I see. You can't run as well as you'd like
right now, huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: All right, show me your face!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: My face? Is somethin' wrong with it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I might be able to learn something about you by
looking at your face. Let me take a peek. ♪

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: U-uh, okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kitasan Black looks deep into the child's eyes.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Good! She has a great look in her eyes. They're
shining with enthusiasm!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(The bright blue sky is reflected vividly in them,
and she's looking straight toward her dream!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay! There's no doubt about it! I'm sure you can
be a champion!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? How could you tell just by lookin' at my
face? Wouldn't it make more sense to look at my
legs?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Nope! A person's face and eyes tell the most
about whether they can run fast or not!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If you're overflowing with motivation, you'll be
able to keep running without losing hope, no
matter how long it takes for you to succeed!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's difficult to know what the future holds for an
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Kitasan Black has showed me that the most
important thing isn't a person's bloodline or the
flashiness of their running.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It might be scary to dive into a totally unknown
world, but just trust me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Let's charge forward together! I'll always be there
to help you out if you get stuck! Okay?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Do you really, REALLY mean that? But if I wanna
be a racer, there're lotsa things I gotta do, right?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um... The thing is, my family doesn't have a lotta
money...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh! You don't need to worry about that.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Dia?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That is, indeed, right. Whatever support you
need, we'll be happy to provide.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We're sponsoring any child who has the
motivation to succeed. As long as your parents
give us permission, there'll be no problem.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You can study running while attending school,
and we can provide lodging for you as well if
needed.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So don't worry about anything and just focus on
running with all your heart, okay?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! You're really doin' all that for me? That's
awesome!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haha! Isn't it great we met such a nice kid, Dia?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Certainly. I found a promising recruit as well.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
E-erm... It's nice to meet you. I want to run too, so
um...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hi! Sounds good! Let's work hard together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has gone from supportee to
supporter. In this northern venture, she searches
for promising racers, and the Satono Group
provides financial aid.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Between her leadership skills and their charity,
they've managed to bring racing to another level.
And not just through this charity work...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is fantastic, Kitasan. Seeing the younger
runners put all they've got into their races is
lighting a real fire in our hearts too!

text_block_list.name: Tracen Academy Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Astounding... The Umamusume who did partner
running with Kitasan Black before their debut
races have all improved dramatically...

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Kitasan Black. The energy at the
winning concerts you perform in are always on a
whole other level!

text_block_list.name: Race Attendant
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to do even more to improve our
racecourse facilities! We won't be able to contain
all the excitement during races otherwise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Here and there, wherever Kitasan goes, smiles
bloom and flourish on people's faces...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, the next year is starting soon. Let's work
hard together.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The festival we're aiming for is just beginning! We
have to keep doing more and more so it can get
bigger and bigger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's never known how to stop, and it's
no different now. Her ambition and drive are
infectious, inspiring all those around her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's like none other, and her dream is so much
vaster than everyone else's too. I doubt anyone
could do as much good for the world as her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I reflect on everything she's done, the words of
all those who work with Umamusume spill forth
from my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What are you thanking me for all of a
sudden?
choice_data_list: I'm so very glad I became your trainer.
I'm so very glad I became your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A-aw, cut that out! Don't just say stuff like that
out of nowhere! I'm the one who should be
thanking you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for looking after me and for valuing
my enthusiasm so much.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I still need to repay you for all your kindness,
Trainer! We're nowhere close to even!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll win tons of races, treat everyone to a great
time, and put the biggest smiles on my fans' faces!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And I know I can do all that because I'm not
alone! I have you and many other friends who will
be there for me on my journey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her deeply empathetic heart, born through her
own hardships, and willingness to aid everyone
truly makes her the clutch captain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's also one thing that sets her apart from
even the most talented Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's a sun that has slowly risen from the far
reaches of the north. No one can claim her, as she
belongs to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, she hangs at the zenith of the sky, shining
her light upon all.
